/cwe/weakness/1118.Name: Insufficient Documentation of Error Handling Techniques
/cwe/weakness/1118.Description:
The documentation does not sufficiently describe the techniques
					that are used for error handling, exception processing, or similar
					mechanisms.
/cwe/weakness/1118.ExtendedDescription: Documentation may need to cover error handling techniques at multiple layers, such as module, executable, compilable code unit, or callable.
